title: Pickaxe Revamped
description: A vanilla-friendly resource pack that redesigns all pickaxes while keeping the vanilla look.
body:
This texture pack redesigns all pickaxes with a fresh and polished look while keeping the vanilla vibe.Each texture is carefully improved to feel more refined and consistent,without ruining the vanilla look.

![Redesigned Pickaxes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf98e2393b9aa2e9cb1c453850a888e1b17feaaf_0.webp)
